hadiths.arabic: إِنَّمَا الأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى
hadiths.english: Actions are judged by intentions, and every person will get what he intended.

hadiths.arabic: لاَ يُؤْمِنُ أَحَدُكُمْ حَتَّى يُحِبَّ لأَخِيهِ مَا يُحِبُّ لِنَفْسِهِ
hadiths.english: None of you truly believes until he loves for his brother what he loves for himself.

hadiths.arabic: لاَ تَحَاسَدُوا وَلاَ تَنَاجَشُوا وَلاَ تَبَاغَضُوا وَلاَ تَدَابَرُوا... كُونُوا عِبَادَ اللَّهِ إِخْوَانًا
hadiths.english: Do not envy one another, do not hate one another, do not turn away from one another... but be servants of Allah, brothers.

hadiths.arabic: مِنْ حُسْنِ إِسْلاَمِ الْمَرْءِ تَرْكُهُ مَا لاَ يَعْنِيهِ
hadiths.english: Part of the perfection of a person's Islam is his leaving that which does not concern him.

hadiths.arabic: احْفَظِ اللَّهَ يَحْفَظْكَ، احْفَظِ اللَّهَ تَجِدْهُ تُجَاهَكَ
hadiths.english: Be mindful of Allah and Allah will protect you. Be mindful of Allah and you will find Him in front of you.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ نَفَّسَ عَنْ مُؤْمِنٍ كُرْبَةً مِنْ كُرَبِ الدُّنْيَا نَفَّسَ اللَّهُ عَنْهُ كُرْبَةً مِنْ كُرَبِ يَوْمِ الْقِيَامَةِ
hadiths.english: Whoever relieves a believer's distress in this world, Allah will relieve his distress on the Day of Resurrection.

hadiths.arabic: اتَّقِ اللَّهَ حَيْثُمَا كُنْتَ، وَأَتْبِعِ السَّيِّئَةَ الْحَسَنَةَ تَمْحُهَا، وَخَالِقِ النَّاسَ بِخُلُقٍ حَسَنٍ
hadiths.english: Fear Allah wherever you may be, and follow up an evil deed with a good deed which will wipe it out, and behave well towards people.

hadiths.arabic: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ
hadiths.english: A true Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hand other Muslims are safe.

hadiths.arabic: مَنْ كَانَ يُؤْمِنُ بِاللَّهِ وَالْيَوْمِ الآخِرِ فَلْيَقُلْ خَيْرًا أَوْ لِيَصْمُتْ
hadiths.english: Let him who believes in Allah and the Last Day speak good or remain silent.

hadiths.arabic: كُنْ فِي الدُّنْيَا كَأَنَّكَ غَرِيبٌ أَوْ عَابِرُ سَبِيلٍ
hadiths.english: Be in this world as if you were a stranger or a traveler.
